Saint's Touch Photography

How to Download
Your Gallery

A quick guide to saving your photos via Pixieset

01
Open your gallery

You'll receive a link via text or email from Saint's Touch Photography. Open it in your browser. Once the gallery loads, tap the three-dot menu (⋮) in the top-right corner.

02
Tap "Download"

A menu will appear. Tap DOWNLOAD to begin the download process.

03
Enter your email

Type in your email address. Pixieset will use this to notify you when your files are packaged and ready. Tap NEXT.

04
Select download settings

Make sure All Photos is checked, select High Resolution for the best quality, and choose Save to My Device. Then tap START DOWNLOAD.

05
Download your zip file

When you see the green checkmark and "Your photos are ready to download", tap the .zip file link to download it to your device.

06
Save to your Files

A save dialog will pop up. Select Files as the save location, then tap the blue Save button. Your photos will be in your Files app, ready to unzip and enjoy.

Questions? Reach out — I'm happy to help.
